content.json:
# Microsoft Defender for Cloud — CWPP Overview
Dashboard for the MDC CWPP workshop. Tiles map directly to scenario IDs in the runbook (S-SRV-XX, S-K8S-XX, S-STO-XX, …).

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName == "Azure Security Center"
| summarize Count=count() by AlertSeverity
| order by Count desc
content.title: Alerts by severity

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName == "Azure Security Center"
| extend Plan = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Defender plan"])
| extend ResourceType = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Resource type"])
| summarize Count=count() by Plan, ResourceType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Alerts by plan / resource type

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName == "Azure Security Center"
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m), AlertSeverity
| render timechart
content.title: Alerts over time

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName == "Azure Security Center"
| project TimeGenerated, AlertSeverity, AlertName, CompromisedEntity, Description, ResourceId=tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].ResourceId)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: Most recent alerts

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName == "Azure Security Center"
| mv-expand Tactics=parse_json(Tactics)
| extend Tactic=tostring(Tactics)
| summarize Count=count() by Tactic
| order by Count desc
content.title: MITRE tactics observed
